'''Mychael Ologat''' was a short but muscular [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] recruit who shared a room with [[Davin Felth/Legends|Davin Felth]] and [[Geoff f'Tuhns]] while in training to become a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]].

{{Char-stub}}
